label: Saltgrit Stores
description: Saltgrit Stores functions as the foundry’s enclosed stockroom, cut into the basalt structure behind sealed bulk partitions that blunt Brineshade’s abrasive haze. Salt-cemented shelving rises in narrow aisles, its edges glazed and chipped from repeated handling of dense ingots, ceramic liners, and grit-rated fittings. The floor slopes to scored drains that trap mineral fines, while low-glare panels and baffle screens preserve visibility under the terminator’s hard contrast. Marked weight plates and anchoring rings along the walls support secured stacking designed to hold alignment against Saltharrow’s pronounced gravitic gradients.
